Moon, Venus & Saturn:—Fwud, wealthy, kind, enjoyer of
pleasures, belongs to middle class, and endowed with sons,
friends and cattle.
Moon, Saturn & Sun:—Poor, sickly, miserable, given to
begging, without some limb, and living by service and
dancing.
Mars, Mercury & Venus:—Sickly in childhood, courteous,
learned in fine arts, a prince and very famous in the world.

ON BHAVAS 115
Mars, J up ire i & Venus:-—Enjoying vehicles and letinue,
renowned, very prosperous, enjoyer of all pleasures, and endowed
with sons and lands.
Mars, Venus <£ Saturn:—Hostile to his mother, wandering
in foreign countries, addicted to other women, ignoble, and will
be humiliated by a royal family.
Mars, Saturn & Sun:—Sinner, deceiver of others' wives, short-
lived, and dies in a foreign place through poison, fire, weapon
or imprisonment.
Mars, Sun & Mercury:—Always wandering, and gets some
corn or food at times with difficulty.
Mercury, Jupiter & Venus:—A king, very opulent, courteous,
